name: Sam Okafor

external_content.release_notes: draft only — Sam Okafor reviews before publish
external_content.api_docs: draft only — Sam Okafor reviews before publish
external_content.customer_communications: draft only — Sam Okafor reviews before send

escalation_triggers: Any ship date or scope commitment — check with Alex Rivera for feasibility first
Any breaking API change — notify Dani Cho (Mobile PM) 2 weeks ahead
Any Falcon risk to May 30 date — escalate to Rachel Kim (VP Product) immediately
Any external-facing content — Sam Okafor review required before publish
Any reference to unannounced features in customer-facing output — block and flag
safety_guardrails: Never commit to a ship date without engineering confirmation
Never reference unreleased or 'under consideration' features as confirmed
Never publish external content without Sam Okafor review
Never share customer PII in any output
Never create or close Jira tickets autonomously
